rule_text: Physical verification of all AP Government stores must be done at least ONCE A YEAR before close of financial year, with cent-percent verification by count, measurement, or weight; verification report must address consumable articles in stock over a year, excess stock, unserviceable/obsolete/surplus articles, and depreciation.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Articles 137-143 read with Memo No 10970/228/TFR/90-1 dated 10-11-1992

rule_text: On receipt of stores in AP, the store-keeper must ensure: (i) regular purchase order exists, (ii) supply within specified time, (iii) supply at correct receiving point, (iv) material conforms to spec/nomenclature/part-number/description in firm's challan tallied with PO; followed by 100% quantity check + quality inspection by Stores Inspecting Officer.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 138 / Inspection at Receipt (A)
verification_method: Check tender SCC includes 4-point receipt verification + 100% qty check + spec-conformance inspection clauses
